title: neltuma humilis
intro: Neltuma humilis, also known as the African Violet, is a small flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Africa. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Neltuma humilis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Neltuma humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
